testcase.name: testDriverSession

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'DILSHAD-AYAAN', ip: '192.168.29.35' Build info: version: '4.45.0', revision: 'cd6a3cd cd6a3cdfca6970f62e5bc8344109d0fe0e2af05e' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {appium:app: D:\Dilshad_SeleniumDemos\Ap..., appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: pixel_7, appium:udid: emulator-5554, platformName: ANDROID}]}] Capabilities {appium:app: D:\Dilshad_SeleniumDemos\Ap..., appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: pixel_7, appium:udid: emulator-5554, platformName: ANDROID}
